model.name: CIFAR-10 Tiny CNN
model.title: The Landscape
model.description: Classifies tiny 32×32 color photos into 10 categories (airplane, car, bird, etc.)

layers.name: conv1.weight
layers.description: First convolutional layer — detects basic color edges and gradients

layers.name: conv2.weight
layers.description: Second convolutional layer — combines edges into textures and corners

layers.name: conv3.weight
layers.description: Third convolutional layer — recognizes parts of objects (wheels, wings, ears)

layers.name: fc1.weight
layers.description: Dense layer — combines spatial features into abstract object representations

layers.name: fc2.weight
layers.description: Output layer — maps 16 features to 10 category predictions
